memoryArtifacts.headline: Proven: Margaret was the wife of Henry Howland. Source: Burial record of Fenstanton
memoryArtifacts.description: Proven: Margaret Howland is the wife of Henry Howland. The entry of burial record shows Margaret Howland was the wife of Henrie Howland and was buried on 31 July 1629. The name of her husband is all written in lower cases as "henrie".

popularStory.headline: Memorial
popularStory.description: When Henry Howland was born in 1567 in Fen Stanton, Huntingdonshire, England, her father, John, was 27, and her mother, Mrs, was 23. She married Henry Howland and they had 25 children together. She th …

zh.Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England: 英國亨廷格多史爾分斯坦頓
zh.lifeSummary: Margaret於大約1567年出生在英國亨廷格多史爾分斯坦頓。她於大約1590年與Henry Howland Of Fenstanton在英國亨廷格多史爾分斯坦頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1629年7月在英國英格蘭亨廷格多史爾分斯坦頓享年63歲，埋葬在英國亨廷格多史爾分斯坦頓。

zh-hans.Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England: 英国亨廷格多史爾分斯坦頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret于大约1567年出生在英国亨廷格多史爾分斯坦頓。她于大约1590年与Henry Howland Of Fenstanton在英国亨廷格多史爾分斯坦頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1629年7月在英国英格兰亨廷格多史爾分斯坦頓享年63岁，埋葬在英国亨廷格多史爾分斯坦頓。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: Margaret was born about 1567, in Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England. She married Henry Howland Of Fenstanton about 1590, in Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died in July 1629, in Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret est née environ 1567, à Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Henry Howland Of Fenstanton environ 1590, à Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en juillet 1629, à Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret wurde um 1567 in Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England geboren. Sie hat um 1590 in Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England Henry Howland Of Fenstanton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb im Juli 1629 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret è nata il circa 1567 nel Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England. Lei sposato Henry Howland Of Fenstanton circa 1590, nel Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel luglio 1629, nel Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England.

ja.Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, England: イギリスハンティングドンシュアイアフエンスタントン
ja.lifeSummary: Margaretは約1567年にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアフエンスタントンで生まれた。約1590年にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアフエンスタントンでHenry Howland Of Fenstantonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1629年7月にイギリスイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアフエンスタントンで63歳で死去し，イギリスハンティングドンシュアイアフエンスタントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret(은)는 대략 1567년 영국 헌틴그도실르 펜스탠턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1590년 영국 헌틴그도실르 펜스탠턴에서 Henry Howland Of Fenstanton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1629년 7월 영국 잉글랜드 헌틴그도실르 펜스탠턴에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 헌틴그도실르 펜스탠턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret nasceu aproximadamente 1567, em Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Henry Howland Of Fenstanton aproximadamente 1590, em Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em julho de 1629, em Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret родилась около 1567 г. в местности фенстантон, хантингдоншир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Howland Of Fenstanton около 1590 г. в местности фенстантон, хантингдоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла июль 1629 г. в местности фенстантон, хантингдоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности фенстантон, хантингдоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret nació aproximadamente 1567, en Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Henry Howland Of Fenstanton aproximadamente 1590, en Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en julio de 1629, en Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Fenstanton, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra.
